diagrams.title: Eucalyptus Architecture Overview
diagrams.description: Hierarchical architecture showing the five main components and their relationships
elements: Cloud Controller (CLC) - Top level, entry point
Cluster Controller (CC) - Middle layer, multiple instances possible
Node Controller (NC) - Bottom layer, multiple instances per cluster
diagrams.purpose: Understanding component hierarchy and data flow in Eucalyptus cloud platform

diagrams.title: VM Instance Launch Flow
diagrams.description: Sequence diagram showing how a user request to launch a VM flows through Eucalyptus components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the step-by-step process of VM provisioning in Eucalyptus

diagrams.title: Eucalyptus vs AWS Compatibility
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing Eucalyptus components mapped to AWS services
elements: Eucalyptus Cloud Controller → AWS EC2 API
diagrams.purpose: Understanding AWS compatibility feature and service mapping in Eucalyptus
